svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="bGCQm_RBFW1meuxhpQ52" name="YAT Website — baseline, single-AZ"> <mxGraphModel dx="910" dy="558" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="r9Nc8_wQWburFTr58_nX-1" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=15;fontStyle=1;" value="YAT Website — Baseline Architecture (single-AZ 2023 pilot · ap-southeast-2 Sydney)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="960" x="40" y="18" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r9Nc8_wQWburFTr58_nX-2" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FAFAFA;strokeColor=#BDBDBD;fontSize=11;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=10;spacingTop=8;" value="Legend
━━━ Public HTTPS: Internet → IGW → single web instance (Elastic IP)
━━━ App → database (MySQL, single-AZ); ┄┄┄ nightly backup → Amazon S3
Single instance · single AZ · single database = known single points of failure (pilot)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="600" x="40" y="56" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r9Nc8_wQWburFTr58_nX-3" parent="1" style="ellipse;shape=cloud;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#546E7A;fontSize=12;" value="Internet
(public visitors · HTTPS)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="76" width="170" x="700" y="58" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r9Nc8_wQWburFTr58_nX-4" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E3F2FD;strokeColor=#1565C0;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=12;spacingTop=8;" value="AWS Region — ap-southeast-2 (Sydney)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="440" width="900" x="80" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r9Nc8_wQWburFTr58_nX-5" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#BBDEFB;strokeColor=#0D47A1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=10;spacingTop=6;" value="VPC 10.0.0.0/16 · DNS resolution + VPC flow logs enabled" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="360" width="840" x="110" y="235" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r9Nc8_wQWburFTr58_nX-6" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFCCBC;strokeColor=#BF360C;fontSize=11;" value="Internet Gateway" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="170" x="140" y="275" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r9Nc8_wQWburFTr58_nX-7" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF59D;strokeColor=#F9A825;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="Amazon S3
nightly backups (regional)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="220" x="700" y="273" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r9Nc8_wQWburFTr58_nX-8" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E8EAF6;strokeColor=#283593;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=10;spacingTop=6;dashed=1;" value="Availability Zone — ap-southeast-2a (single)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="220" width="780" x="140" y="350" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r9Nc8_wQWburFTr58_nX-9" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF9C4;strokeColor=#F9A825;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=6;spacingTop=4;dashed=1;" value="public-web-a 10.0.1.0/24" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="155" width="360" x="160" y="390" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r9Nc8_wQWburFTr58_nX-10" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#7B1FA2;fontSize=11;" value="EC2 — Website (LAMP / CMS)
single instance · Elastic IP
media on local EBS
⚠ single point of failure" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="105" width="320" x="180" y="425" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r9Nc8_wQWburFTr58_nX-11" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFEBEE;strokeColor=#C62828;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=6;spacingTop=4;dashed=1;" value="private-data-a 10.0.21.0/24" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="155" width="360" x="540" y="390" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r9Nc8_wQWburFTr58_nX-12" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#C62828;fontSize=11;" value="Amazon RDS for MySQL
single-AZ ⚠ not HA
no standby" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="105" width="320" x="560" y="425" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r9Nc8_wQWburFTr58_nX-13" edge="1" parent="1" source="r9Nc8_wQWburFTr58_nX-3" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#546E7A;strokeWidth=2;" target="r9Nc8_wQWburFTr58_nX-6"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="225" y="160" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r9Nc8_wQWburFTr58_nX-14" edge="1" parent="1" source="r9Nc8_wQWburFTr58_nX-6" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#7B1FA2;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=10;" target="r9Nc8_wQWburFTr58_nX-10" value="HTTPS:443"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r9Nc8_wQWburFTr58_nX-15" edge="1" parent="1" source="r9Nc8_wQWburFTr58_nX-10" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#C62828;fontSize=10;" target="r9Nc8_wQWburFTr58_nX-12" value="MySQL"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r9Nc8_wQWburFTr58_nX-16" edge="1" parent="1" source="r9Nc8_wQWburFTr58_nX-10" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;strokeColor=#F9A825;dashed=1;fontSize=10;" target="r9Nc8_wQWburFTr58_nX-7" value="nightly backup"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.div:
Legend
━━━ Public HTTPS: Internet → IGW → single web instance (Elastic IP)
━━━ App → database (MySQL, single-AZ); ┄┄┄ nightly backup → Amazon S3
Single instance · single AZ · single database = known single points of failure (pilot)
